title: Estimate mass (grams and kilograms)
description: Practice estimating the mass of real life objects using grams and kilograms.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which is the closest to the mass of a baby chick?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

[[☃ image 1]]
hints:
A small paperclip has a mass of about $1$ gram:
[[☃ image 1]]

A wooden baseball bat has a mass of about $1$ kilogram:

[[☃ image 2]]
Is the mass of a baby chick closer to $25$ paperclips (grams) or $25$ baseball bats (kilograms)?
The mass of a baby chick is about $25$ grams.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Identify the most reasonable unit to measure the mass of an average adult.**  


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
A small paperclip has a mass of about $1$ gram:
[[☃ image 1]]

A wooden baseball bat has a mass of about $1$ kilogram: 
[[☃ image 2]]
Is it more reasonable to measure how many 'paperclips heavy' a person is or how many 'bats heavy' she is?
Kilograms is the most reasonable unit to measure the mass of an average adult.
